testcase.name: loginWithoutRequiredData

testcase.name: loginWithNonExistentUser
testcase.system-out:
Hibernate: select ue1_0.id,ue1_0.created_at,ue1_0.email,ue1_0.password,ue1_0.updated_at from users ue1_0 2026-05-25T16:53:56.817+02:00 INFO 233438 --- [backend] [ main] c.datashare.backend.service.AuthService : Login attempt for email: test@test.com Hibernate: select ue1_0.id,ue1_0.created_at,ue1_0.email,ue1_0.password,ue1_0.updated_at from users ue1_0 where ue1_0.email=?

testcase.name: loginSuccessful
testcase.system-out:
Hibernate: select ue1_0.id,ue1_0.created_at,ue1_0.email,ue1_0.password,ue1_0.updated_at from users ue1_0 2026-05-25T16:53:56.921+02:00 INFO 233438 --- [backend] [ main] c.datashare.backend.service.UserService : Registering new user Hibernate: select ue1_0.id,ue1_0.created_at,ue1_0.email,ue1_0.password,ue1_0.updated_at from users ue1_0 where ue1_0.email=?
